tipAccount: Your Claude subscription info. Shows plan type, subscription age, and a usage intensity bar comparing today's usage to your historical peak.
tipSessions: Currently running Claude Code CLI sessions. Green dot = active, red = ended. The purple background bar shows relative output token usage. Right side shows model, output tokens, messages, and uptime.
tipCompare: Left column shows today's usage, right shows this month's total. Messages = conversation count, Tokens = text processed by AI, Est. Cost = estimated API pricing (Max subscribers are not actually charged).
tipEfficiency: Avg Tokens/Msg: lower = more concise conversations. Cache Hit Rate: higher = more cost-efficient (100% is ideal). Tools/Msg: higher means complex engineering tasks (file reads, searches, commands).
tipProgress: This bar compares today's usage to your historical daily average. Orange at 80%, red at 150% — meaning you're using much more than usual.
tipChart: 14-day usage chart. Purple = Token volume, Cyan = Message count. Easily spot your busiest days.
tipModel: Token usage per AI model. Purple = Input (your content), Orange = Output (AI replies), Green = Cache (reused data, cheaper). Higher cache ratio = better.
tipAllTime: Lifetime totals since you started using Claude Code. Est. Total Cost is based on API pricing (Max users aren't charged, but it shows how much you've saved).
tipPlan: Shows your Claude subscription usage limits including current session, weekly model quotas, and extra usage spending. Data is scraped from claude.ai settings in real time.
tipHeatmap: Each cell represents an hour of the day (0-23). Darker color means more Claude sessions started at that hour. Shows your work patterns.
tipRecords: Your Claude Code milestones: first session date, total days, startups, longest session duration and message count, and web searches.
tipProjects: Recent session cost estimates per project with lines added/removed. Sorted by cost to show which projects consume the most.
tipDesktop: Detects whether Claude Desktop app is installed and shows its version.
tipAllProjects: Scans all Claude Code projects on your machine. Green dot = folder still exists, gray = deleted or moved. Shows sessions, messages, and token usage per project.
tipTrend: Compares this week's usage with last week. Green badges mean decrease, red badges mean increase relative to last week.
